case_title: JAIRO BONILLA VS. ARNEL GARCIA ARUCAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MV PUBLIC TRANSPORATION, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00) SERVED NOV-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARUCAN, ARNEL GARCIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MV PUBLIC TRANSPORATION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONILLA, JAIRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARUCAN, ARNEL GARCIA MV PUBLIC TRANSPORATION, INC. $3,095.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,160.00, DEFENDANTS ARNEL GARCIA ARUCAN AND MV PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF JAIRO BONILLA. RECOVERY IS FOR $2955 REPAIR OF VEHICLE AND LOSS OF WAGES 1 DAY LYFT $140 EQUALS $3095. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,630.00 FILED BY BONILLA, JAIRO AS TO DEFENDANT ARUCAN, ARNEL GARCIA MV PUBLIC TRANSPORATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESSING: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONILLA, JAIRO AS TO DEFENDANT MV PUBLIC TRANSPORATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JAIRO BONILLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARNEL GARCIA ARUCAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MV PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANTOS M. ORELLANA GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
